inputs.prompt: Programme: 'Good Morning Metro' — 2-hour morning show (7-9am), mix of news, features, music, and interviews. Content: 1) 7am news bulletin (3 min). 2) Interview with a local MP about hospital funding (6 min). 3) Music set — 3 songs. 4) Feature: reporter package on a new community farm project (4 min). 5) 7:30 news headlines (1 min). 6) Phone-in topic: Should school start times be later? (15 min). 7) Music set — 2 songs. 8) 8am full news bulletin (4 min). 9) Interview with a cookbook author (8 min). 10) Travel and weather (2 min). 11) Music set — 3 songs. 12) Final segment: listener pick of the day. 13) 9am news handover.
Programme: 1-hour music show (8-9pm). Content: 8 music tracks, one short interview (5 min) with a local band, one listener request segment (3 min).

Programme: 'Europa Heute' — 90-minute pan-European current affairs programme (6-7:30am), broadcast in German on a public radio network. Content: 1) 6am news (5 min). 2) Correspondent report from Brussels on EU budget negotiations (4 min). 3) Studio analysis with two commentators (8 min). 4) 6:30 headlines (2 min). 5) Feature: audio documentary excerpt on youth unemployment in Southern Europe (6 min). 6) Interview with OECD economist on European growth forecasts (7 min). 7) 7am full news (5 min). 8) Correspondent report from Warsaw on Polish-German border tensions (4 min). 9) Culture segment: review of new European film (5 min). 10) 7:30 close with programme preview for tomorrow.
